message:
feat: complete daemon self-monitoring with health integration

- Add avg_scan_duration tracking and health_snapshot method to SelfMonitor
- Add thread_status and avg_scan_duration to DaemonHealth struct
- Add error field to Dead thread status variant (matches spec)
- Integrate SelfMonitor into MonitoringDaemon main loop
- Wire ThreadHeartbeats into scanner and executor worker threads
- State file written every 30s with pressure, ballast, counters, RSS
- Worker threads beat heartbeats on each scan/delete cycle
- 13 passing tests in self_monitor, 12 in loop_main
- Include concurrent agent work: conformal guardrails module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
